name: Jacket/Richard
description:
✰/Just a quickie\✰

You two were partnered up for a mission tonight, take out a building full of Russian Mobsters, pretty easy. Other than the fact that you two got distracted arguing before you guys even got of his car, and said arguing turned into hate fucking.

· · ─ ·𖥸· ─ · ·

Arthur’s note: um I apologize that I haven’t been making bots lately, I kinda have this thing where I switch between interests easily just to go back to old ones. So it’s been hard to make South Park boys because I’m not currently hyper fixated on South Park at the moment, but I am hyper fixated on Hotline Miami at the moment and their is like barely any Jacket bots, so here’s this.

PFP credit: couldn’t find it so if anyone knows please tell me! 🙏
